purpose: Local Qatar transit topology used by Qaarib for metro/tram reasoning. This is topology/context, not live schedules.
critical_notes: Doha Metro has Red, Green, and Gold lines. Msheireb is the central interchange for Red, Green, and Gold.
Al Bidda is an interchange between Red and Green.
Legtaifiya connects Doha Metro Red Line with Lusail Tram.
Hamad International Airport T1 is on the Red Line airport branch. It is not on the Green Line.
Oqba Ibn Nafie is on the Red Line airport-side path toward Hamad International Airport T1.
Free Zone, Ras Bu Fontas, and Al Wakra are on the Red Line Al Wakra branch. From Ras Bu Fontas to HIA T1, the user must be careful about Red Line branch/destination signs.
Qatar National Library, Education City, and Al Shaqab are Green Line stations serving Education City / Qatar Foundation.
Msheireb Tram is a short local downtown loop. It is not the Doha Metro and not a cross-city tram.
Education City Tram is a campus tram network linked around Education City / Qatar Foundation stops. It is separate from Doha Metro but connects near Green Line stations.
Lusail Tram is a Lusail local tram network connected to Doha Metro through Legtaifiya, with Lusail/QNB area also shown on network maps.

notes: For HIA, use the Red Line airport branch toward Hamad International Airport T1.
For Al Wakra / Ras Bu Fontas, use the Red Line Al Wakra branch.
If the user is already on the Al Wakra branch and wants HIA, warn them to check branch/destination signs or transfer as needed.
Green Line serves Education City / Qatar Foundation through Education City, Qatar National Library, and Al Shaqab stations.
Green Line does not go to Hamad International Airport T1.
Gold Line is useful for Souq Waqif, National Museum, Sport City, Al Aziziyah, and Ras Bu Aboud.
Gold Line does not go to HIA T1.

interchange_notes: Wadi Msheireb is the practical link toward Msheireb Metro / downtown access.
Use this tram for local Msheireb Downtown movement, not cross-city travel.

notes: Use Education City Tram for Qatar Foundation campus movement after arriving by Green Line.
For QCRI / HBKU / Minaretein, walking may be exposed; combine tram, short walk, or taxi depending on heat and urgency.
Legtaifiya is the important Red Line to Lusail Tram transfer.
Use Lusail Tram only after reaching Lusail/Legtaifiya area; it does not serve Education City or HIA.

source_notes: Seeded from Qatar Rail style metro/tram maps supplied during development, public Doha Metro/Lusail/Msheireb/Education City transit references, and local demo needs.
This file is not live schedule data; use web_search for opening hours, service disruptions, and official current notices.
